panels.description: Wide shot: Interior of a small steamboat deck. Focus on 'He' standing, momentarily off-balance, looking intently toward the left (away from the water). The steamboat is sharply banking right. Background shows churning water on the left and the relative calm of the open sea to the right. Dramatic lighting suggesting sudden movement.

Medium shot, slightly Dutch angle: 'He' is sprawling forward onto the deck after being thrown from his feet. People around him are shouting and moving frantically in the background. Heavy motion lines indicating the violent lurch of the deck. Intense, chaotic atmosphere.

Extreme wide shot, dynamic perspective: View from the pitching steamboat deck. Dominating the foreground and center is the colossal, dark iron bulk of the Thunder Child tearing through the water, throwing up massive white foam waves that momentarily swamp the smaller boat. Low angle emphasizes the size of the ironclad. Stormy, dramatic lighting.

Close-up on the brother's face: Water spray streaks across his vision, obscuring his eyes momentarily (showing distortion/streaks). His expression shifts from shock to immediate focus as the spray clears.

Medium shot: Focus on the approaching Thunder Child as it powers forward. Dual funnels are visible, spewing black smoke and sparks/fire. The focus is on the technological might of the ship against the dark sea.

Ultra wide angle, panoramic view: Brother clings to the railing of the steamboat (bottom edge). In the distant background, three indistinct, sunken Martian tripods are visible in the water between the steamboat and the charging Thunder Child. The Martians look small and tentative against the massive ship.

Medium close-up: Focus back on the brother, gripping the railing, looking intensely towards the receding shape of the Thunder Child (seen faintly in the background mist/distance). Lighting is harsh, emphasizing the tension.
Close-up: One Martian figure, partially obscured by water/mist, is seen lowering its weapon tube towards the ironclad. Focus on the mechanical action of the weapon charging or firing.

Wide dynamic shot: The black gas canister explodes against the hull of the Thunder Child (off-center), creating an expanding, inky black cloud rolling away over the ocean surface. The ironclad is driving through it. Sunlight glints off the spray.

Mid-range shot capturing the Martian combat: One Martian is visibly staggering backward, steam and bright orange flame erupting from where the Heat-Ray struck the water near it. The other Martians are beginning to retreat shoreward. Chaotic scene focusing on the visible damage to the alien.
